name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what gets in the way? Describe the use case, not just the solution.

## Proposed solution

What you would like coach to do. Note which surface it touches (pipeline, MCP server, viz) if known.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Anything else — example traces, related issues, or links.
